/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_first_pkg_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libmy_first_pkg_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/my_first_pkg_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/my_first_pkg_interfaces/msg/detail/my_data__description.c.o CMakeFiles/my_first_pkg_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/my_first_pkg_interfaces/msg/detail/my_data__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/my_first_pkg_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/my_first_pkg_interfaces/msg/detail/my_data__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
